title: papaver setosum
intro: Papaver setosum, also known as the silky poppy or Setous poppy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Papaveraceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its alkaloid content, which has been used to treat various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory problems due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, providing health benefits such as relieving congestion and soothing irritated tissues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
